message:
test(embedders): Add comprehensive unit tests for static embedders

Create tests/static_embedders.rs with 53 tests covering:
- Hash embedder (always available, no model files needed)
- Static MRL embedder (ONNX-based with MRL support)
- Model2Vec embedder (static lookup)

Test categories:
- Model constants and registry
- Embedding dimensions and normalization
- MRL truncation and re-normalization (critical)
- Batch processing
- Edge cases (unicode, empty, long text)
- Determinism and performance baselines

25 tests run immediately, 28 require model files (#[ignore])

Closes bd-3783

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
